comment.body:
not directly bullish, depends on the context. 
the article only says that vol is dumping and wil lget sold.
when investors short correlation, long dispersion, they pin index vol. 
they buy vol at certain assets and sell vol on the otherside. 
if markets are at ATH, low vol logically stabilizes it on those lvls + vanna/charm tailwind
comment.raw_body:
not directly bullish, depends on the context. 
the article only says that vol is dumping and wil lget sold.
when investors short correlation, long dispersion, they pin index vol. 
they buy vol at certain assets and sell vol on the otherside. 
if markets are at ATH, low vol logically stabilizes it on those lvls + vanna/charm tailwind
